headline: Alan Armstrong Becomes Newest U.S. Senator
summary: Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt selected the energy executive to fill the seat being vacated by Sen. Markwayne Mullin until a new election takes place in November.

raw.headline: Alan Armstrong Becomes Newest U.S. Senator
raw.summary: Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt selected the energy executive to fill the seat being vacated by Sen. Markwayne Mullin until a new election takes place in November.

headline: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
summary: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.
